channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Trip hazard. Missing gutter cover on pavement Granville St, 1st April
item.description:
Part of the gutter cover in the pavement between 18 & 19 Granville St is missing, causing a dangerous trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Granville Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 1st April
item.description:
CW: Abrupt Level Difference (Patch Required) around 3 inspection covers. 2100mmx900mmx44mm TM: Give and Take Stats required Outside Monster Mix (CW6 Abrupt Level Differences )
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 1st April
item.description:

item.title: Sofa flytipped, 1st April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-8, Robins Close, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
